Bash(python -c "import json;d=json.load\(open\('cmiss.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\);c=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('contours',[]\);print\('contours 站点数:',len\(c\)\);print\('单站字段数:',len\(c[0]\) if c else 0\);print\('首站样本:',c[0] if c else None\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./cmiss.json'\);const c=\(d.data&&d.data.contours\)||[];console.log\('contours 站点数:',c.length\);console.log\('单站字段数:',c[0]?c[0].length:0\);console.log\('首站样本:',JSON.stringify\(c[0]\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./wind.json'\);const h=d[0]&&d[0].header;console.log\('header:',JSON.stringify\(h\)\);console.log\('分量数:',d.length,'每分量像素数:',h?\(h.nx*h.ny\):0\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./cmiss.json'\);const c=\(d.data&&d.data.contours\)||[];let lats=c.map\(s=>s[2]\),lngs=c.map\(s=>s[1]\);console.log\('纬度范围:',Math.min\(...lats\).toFixed\(2\),'~',Math.max\(...lats\).toFixed\(2\)\);console.log\('经度范围:',Math.min\(...lngs\).toFixed\(2\),'~',Math.max\(...lngs\).toFixed\(2\)\);const temp=c.filter\(s=>s[19]!==9999\);console.log\('有温度的站点数:',temp.length\)")

Bash(cp /tmp/lv-src.js "/c/Users/李伟/Desktop/气象地图预研/.lv-src-tmp.js" && echo "copied" && grep -nE "onAdd:|onRemove:|needRedraw|_clearAndRedraw|_initCanvas|addTo:|_redraw\\b|_frame\\b|this\\._map\\b|_buildBounds|_draw\\b" "/c/Users/李伟/Desktop/气象地图预研/.lv-src-tmp.js")

Bash(node -e 'const fs=require\("fs"\);const C={1:"晴",8:"多云",13:"阴",26:"雾",29:"沙尘暴",30:"浮尘",32:"扬沙",34:"霾",49:"雨夹雪",51:"小雨",53:"中雨",54:"大雨",55:"暴雨",56:"大暴雨",57:"特大暴雨",58:"小雪",60:"中雪",62:"大雪",63:"暴雪"};const codes=Object.keys\(C\);const miss=codes.filter\(c=>!fs.existsSync\("weather/base/rs/img/tq-"+c+".png"\)\);console.log\("电码总数:",codes.length\);console.log\("缺失图片:",miss.length?miss.join\(", "\):"无 ✓"\);console.log\("抽查映射 53→"+C["53"]+", 1→"+C["1"]+", 63→"+C["63"]+", 49→"+C["49"]\);console.log\("缺测兜底 9999→"+\(C["9999"]||"undefined，将兜底为 "+C["13"]\)\);')
Bash(python -m http.server 8765 --directory "c:/Users/李伟/Desktop/气象地图预研/weather")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./cmiss.json'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\); const arr=Array.isArray\(d.data\)?d.data:[]; console.log\('时间步数:', arr.length\); if\(arr[0]\){const c=arr[0].contours||[]; console.log\('首步站点数:', c.length\); console.log\('单站字段数:', c[0]?c[0].length:0\); console.log\('首步 date:', arr[0].date\);}")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./cmiss.json'\);const a=d.data;for\(let t=0;t<3;t++\){const c=a[t].contours||[];let mn=1e9,mx=-1e9,sum=0,n=0;for\(const s of c\){const p=s[8];if\(p<9999\){if\(p<mn\)mn=p;if\(p>mx\)mx=p;sum+=p;n++;}}console.log\('step',t,'气压 min/max/avg:',mn.toFixed\(1\),mx.toFixed\(1\),\(sum/n\).toFixed\(1\)\);} const c0=a[0].contours||[],c1=a[1].contours||[];let dmax=0,dsum=0,dn=0;for\(let i=0;i<c0.length;i++\){const dd=Math.abs\(c0[i][8]-c1[i][8]\);if\(dd>dmax\)dmax=dd;dsum+=dd;dn++;}console.log\('step0→1 每站气压差: max',dmax.toFixed\(2\),'avg',\(dsum/dn\).toFixed\(3\),'hPa'\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./cmiss.json'\);const a=d.data;const all=[];for\(let t=0;t<a.length;t++\){for\(const s of \(a[t].contours||[]\)\){const p=s[8];if\(p<9990&&p>-990\)all.push\(p\);}}all.sort\(\(x,y\)=>x-y\);const lo=all[Math.floor\(all.length*0.02\)],hi=all[Math.floor\(all.length*0.98\)];console.log\('气压 p2/p98 主体范围:',lo.toFixed\(1\),'~',hi.toFixed\(1\),'hPa'\);")
